visual_description: The scene is set in a diner. A woman with short, graying hair and glasses sits at a table, looking forward with a neutral expression. Next to her, a man with dark, curly hair and glasses, wearing a green turtleneck and a black jacket, sits with his mouth slightly open. An older man with gray hair, wearing a white collared shirt, stands in the background, looking forward with a stern expression.
audio_description: A woman is heard shouting in a high-pitched, strained voice, followed by a loud, sustained electronic buzzer sound.
